events.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents
events.summary: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.
